name: jkpark-claude-plugin
description: Personal Claude Code plugin. Skills: idea-refiner (iterative Korean Q&A that turns a vague idea into a buildable spec), tech-blog-writer (research a topic/article and publish an image-rich, junior-friendly Korean tech blog post as HTML), and analyze-image (look at an image the user wants analyzed without making them mention the clipboard — checks the macOS clipboard first by default). Agent: korean-reviewer (proofreads generated Korean documents for unnatural phrasing). Hook: auto-suggests korean-reviewer after .md/.html/.pptx docs are written.
